pr_description:
GraphQL v16 has been released recently so this PR does the following changes for the compatibility;

- [x] Type resolvers no longer returns type itself but the name of the type because this no longer supported in v16
- [x] Update TS version because v16 doesn't support existing version
- [x] Add tests for both v15 and v16
- [x] Use the custom implementation of `collectFields` in `json.ts` because it has been changed in v16
- [x] Fix typing issues
- [x] Use isSubType instead of isPossibleType because it has been removed in v16
- [x] Replace `toEqual` with `toMatchObject` to compare results because `GraphQLError` is no longer serialized like JSO
- [x] Remove Node 10 from CI because v16 doesn't support it and it has been no longer maintained.
- [x] Update TS version to support latest changes and v16
- [x] Migrate to ESlint and update Prettier to support new TypeScript ESLint plugin
